title: Preview-Protecting Tabbed Console
concept: A responsive tabbed operations workspace that keeps the live WordPress shell large and persistent while Start, Save, Playgrounds, Site Manager, Blueprints, and Transfers mutate the same active Playground object.
focus: route-specific PR and branch preview lifecycle
stateful saved object and replacement flows
flows: Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch end to end with typed route input, validation progress, runtime build progress, resulting preview identity, path mutation, and unlocked save/export availability

Save an unsaved or preview Playground in browser storage with destination choice, file-copy progress, saved row insertion, active title update, browser slug, storage badge, and Save & Reload consequence
Save to a local directory as a distinct destination with folder permission, local identity, reconnect-after-refresh consequence, and transfer history
Manage saved, local, temporary, preview, Blueprint, and imported Playground objects with open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, final row removal, and fallback active state
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip while the live WordPress shell remains visible
Run a selected Blueprint from an honest representative subset of the 43-item gallery with validation, replacement confirmation, final preview mutation, and transfer history
Use portability actions for GitHub import/export, zip import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle copy/download/run with visible history
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch route with validation and preview result
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser model, replacement confirmation, and final imported state
Blueprint gallery categories and search with an honest representative subset of 43 entries
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser-backed slug
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, preview, Blueprint, and imported Playground object list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, final row removal, and active fallback
Active shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, reset, and reload consequences
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, replacement warning, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, database size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history that records saves, PR previews, Blueprint runs, ZIP replacement, database download, GitHub export, rename, delete, file edits, and path navigation
Mobile layout exposing current path, save state, start action, Site Manager, and saved Playgrounds without horizontal overflow
